name: Create a Pan Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a bowl, combine flour, baking soda and salt; set aside.
3. In another bowl, beat butter, sugars and vanilla until creamy.
4. Beat in eggs. Gradually add the flour mixture.
5. Stir in chocolate chips and the ingredients for whatever type of cookie you want to make.
6. Spread into an ungreased 15x10" jelly roll pan.
7. Bake 18-20 minutes.
8. Cut into 35 bars when cooled.
- For Granola Nut: Add ingredients listed when it calls for in recipe.
- For Apricot Cashew: Add ingredients listed when it calls for in recipe.
- For Apple Oatmeal: Decrease flour to 2 cups. Add ingredients listed when it calls for in recipe.
- For Carrot Pineapple: Increase flour to 2-3/4 cups. Add ingredients listed when it calls for in recipe.
